title: [MME] Mag-Mudge's Ecosystem
description: MME adds new blocks to Minecraft such as wired blocks, new fence types or new door/trapdoor types. There are also new plants, ores, villager professions and structures.
body:
Mag-Mudge's Ecosystem adds **new ore**, **trees** and **plants** to Minecraft. **New workbenches** enable the crafting of **new items and blocks**. Some blocks can be manipulated with **new tools**.
Villagers can practise **new professions**. **New mobs** spawn. **New food** needs to be tried and **new potions** tested. Large and small **structures** (buildings etc.) want to be explored.

A new type of fence, the twin wire mesh fence, is added to Minecraft.
**Wired blocks**, repeating blocks and wired fences allow space-saving and "invisible" forwarding of redstone signals.
The randomiser block forwards an incoming redstone signal in a flickering manner (configurable).
Hidden doors and trap doors are visually indistinguishable from the block from which they are made.
Pressure trapdoors open automatically when certain mobs/players step on them.
Furthermore, several light sources are added. Some of these light sources only light up when a redstone signal is received.
Several decorative blocks such as book piles and statues or furniture such as tables, benches and commodes are added by the mod.    
...

A [detailed overview](https://github.com/mag-mudge/magmudges-ecosystem/blob/main/docs/index.md) of the new features and requirements is available [here](https://github.com/mag-mudge/magmudges-ecosystem/blob/main/docs/index.md).


**Optional Dependency**  
Roughly Enough Items Fabric (REI)
